launches.name: GPT-5.5 by OpenAI
launches.tagline: OpenAI's smartest and most intuitive to use model yet
launches.description: GPT-5.5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model yet, designed to handle real-world work with greater autonomy, speed, and efficiency. It excels at coding, research, data analysis, and task execution — planning, using tools, and iterating with minimal guidance — making it a powerful partner for complex, multi-step workflows.

launches.name: Claude Connectors
launches.tagline: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
launches.description: Claude now connects with 200+ apps like Spotify, Instacart, Uber, and TripAdvisor, letting you book, order, and plan without leaving a single conversation. Designed for both work and daily life, it brings travel, food, and entertainment together intelligently suggesting and executing tasks in real time.

launches.name: QuickCompare by Trismik
launches.tagline: Compare LLMs on your data, measure, and pick the best.
launches.description: Stop guessing which LLM to use. Upload your data, compare 50+ models, and see quality, cost, and speed side by side. Pick the best model for your use case without manual testing or generic benchmarks.

launches.name: Happenstance
launches.tagline: Search your network with AI
launches.description: Happenstance lets you search across Gmail, Twitter, Instagram, and more using natural language. Built for founders, recruiters, and sales teams finding the right person through warm connections.

launches.name: Edgee Team
launches.tagline: Strava for your coding assistants
launches.description: Who on your team shipped more with less? Which repo is silently eating your AI budget? Edgee Teams gives coding assistants their missing dashboard. Invite your team, connect GitHub, and every session gets tracked, attributed, and ranked. Compare compression ratios across developers. Share session stats publicly or keep them private. Climb the monthly leaderboard and claim the title of biggest token spender. Built for teams shipping with Claude Code, Codex, and other agents.

launches.name: Layman
launches.tagline: Caveman fork - but much cooler, Now anyone.. ANYONE can code
launches.description: Layman is what happens when your AI stops writing essays and starts speaking human. It turns giant coding-agent dumps into clean “what changed” updates your team can read without a decoder ring. Bonus: brief modes can cut output tokens by up to 75%, so responses are faster and limits hurt less. One-line install. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini, and more.

launches.name: shieldcn
launches.tagline: Beautiful, modern, customizable readme badges.
launches.description: A shields.io alternative with shadcn/ui design quality. GitHub, npm, and Discord badges with 6 variants, 16 themes, and 5,000+ icons. Free and open source.

launches.name: ZeroClaw
launches.tagline: Rust autonomous agent runtime. ~5MB core, runs on anything.
launches.description: ZeroClaw is a private AI assistant that runs 100% locally on your machine. Connect to Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp. Your data never leaves your computer. No cloud, no subscriptions, complete privacy.

launches.name: Repli
launches.tagline: Get cited by every AI & Rank on Google on autopilot.
launches.description: Most AI SEO tools dump standalone articles. No cross-linking, cluster architecture, or compounding authority. Repli builds pillar-cluster systems where every article strengthens the whole. Named frameworks baked into every piece. AI can't cite a concept without citing the source. That's the citation loop most tools miss. LLM analytics: see which AI cited you, for which query, how often. Lifetime 60% off (99$/mo): REPLIFIRST100. You can also try Repli & get a full website audit for 1$

launches.name: Octomind – Plug n Play AI Agents
launches.tagline: Homebrew for AI agents. Single binary, zero config.
launches.description: Open source AI agent runtime built in Rust. Install one binary, set one API key, run specialist agents in 30 seconds. 39 pre-built agents across 10 domains — dev, devops, security, medical, legal, finance. Like Homebrew: `octomind run developer:rust`. 13+ AI providers, swap mid-session. Adaptive compression saves 72.5% tokens for infinite sessions. Agents extend themselves at runtime via dynamic MCP. Ships with semantic code search, persistent memory, smart file ops. Apache 2.0. No lock-in.

launches.name: Ethan Tales
launches.tagline: Turn your kid's favorite toy into a bedtime storybook
launches.description: Every kid has that one stuffed animal they won't let go of. Now it can be the hero of their own storybook. Snap a photo of your child's toy. Pick a real challenge they're facing — bedtime fears, sharing, potty training, first day of school. Our AI writes and illustrates a complete picture book where their toy navigates that same challenge, in a way that's gentle and never preachy. The illustrations actually look like your child's toy, consistent across every page. Ages 2-5. First book free.

launches.name: ClauseCheck — Stop signing bad contracts
launches.tagline: Stop signing contracts that screw you
launches.description: AI contract scanner that flags risky clauses freelancers miss — IP grabs, auto-renewals, kill fees, unlimited liability. Gives plain-English explanations and redlines you can paste back. File never leaves your browser. Free tier: 5 scans/mo. Pro: $3.99/mo. Chrome extension included. 👉 Try it now — no signup, no install: https://www.clause-check.app/demo ✅ Chrome extension live: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/dmfkeoijggalpdonblfmlkpbhppfmjgj

launches.name: Capital Sound
launches.tagline: AI-powered daily market podcasts for investors
launches.description: Capital Sound turns financial news into daily podcast briefings you can listen to on your commute. Every morning and evening, our AI analyzes market movements, earnings reports, and insider transaction data, then delivers a professional-quality audio digest. Features include personalized watchlist tracking with per-stock audio briefings, Top 10 stock picks based on insider confidence, and AI-powered earnings analysis.

launches.name: Github as a Service (GaaS)
launches.tagline: Zero cost. Zero infrastructure. Free Database
launches.description: GaaS is an NPM package that turns any GitHub private (or public) repository into a lightweight database — with collections, key-value store, file storage, schema validation, encryption, and more. Perfect for MVPs, side projects, hackathons, and internal tools. Zero cost. Zero infrastructure. Your data, your repo.

launches.name: AI Readiness Assessment
launches.tagline: Find out if you actually need AI agents (most don't)
launches.description: Most businesses get pitched complex AI agents when basic automation would do the job. This free AI Powered quiz fixes that. Answer a few questions in 2 minutes, and an AI analyzes your responses to tell you exactly what to build first: agents, automation, or simpler tools. Industry specific verdicts across legal, healthcare, ecommerce, SaaS, real estate, and 5 more verticals. Built by an engineer who has shipped 109+ production AI systems.

launches.name: CC Pocket
launches.tagline: Native mobile client for Codex and Claude
launches.description: CC Pocket is a free, self-hosted mobile client for Codex and Claude. Run the Bridge Server on your Mac or Linux machine, then connect over Tailscale or local Wi-Fi to start, resume, approve, and review coding-agent sessions from iPhone, iPad, Android, or macOS. Built for developers who want native mobile approvals, rich prompts, git diffs, push notifications, and multi-session workflows while keeping code and conversations on their own machine.

launches.name: Praxsuite
launches.tagline: AI-powered operating system for your business
launches.description: Automate Business AI Operations with one platform. No-Code, Easy and Powerful, scale your business now.

launches.name: humanizerfree
launches.tagline: 100% Free AI Humanizer. No Paywall, Bypass All Detectors.
launches.description: AI content is everywhere. Most tools in 2026 are mostly paywall. humanizerfree changes that. No account, no credit-card, no usage limits. Built on propertiary model trained on 10M+ human-written documents, it consistently bypass GPTZero, Turnitin and ZeroGPT. Built for students, writers, and professional who demand quality, authentic writing without a subscription. No download. Can be accessible any device. Free and available instantly.

launches.name: AI Developer Studio
launches.tagline: Create your Apple Intelligence foundation-model in minutes
launches.description: With AI Developer Studio you create your Apple Intelligence foundation-model in minutes and use it in your iOS or macOS app. * Experiment and try out your ideas: just by playing around, you’ll get lots of inspiration for new apps. * Reduce time to market: develop the best query for your needs in minutes. * Ready-to-use Swift code: AI Developer Studio generates code you can use in your iOS or macOS app.

launches.name: TVT Crew Beta Signup
launches.tagline: Restaurant AI Scheduling and management software.
launches.description: AI-powered scheduling, team chat, shift management, and more. Built for restaurants. Now open for free beta access. No API costs for AI usage.

launches.name: Claude Squad
launches.tagline: Multiplayer AI coding - split the work and the cost
launches.description: Claude Squad is a self-hosted multiplayer coding tool. Your whole team shares one session, each person connects their local Claude Code as an agent with one command. You describe what to build, an orchestrator splits it into parallel tasks, agents run simultaneously on separate branches, then everything auto-merges into one PR. Token cost divides across everyone who joined. MIT licensed, runs on free-tier infra (Vercel + Supabase + Partykit). Your API keys never leave your machine.

launches.name: StreamSense
launches.tagline: Your players are talking. Are you listening?
launches.description: When someone streams your game on Twitch, hundreds of players are typing bugs, complaints, and feature ideas in real time — and most developers never see them. StreamSense connects to any live stream of your game, captures the chat, filters out the noise, and uses AI to generate a structured summary: bugs found, UX friction, feature requests, and what players actually loved. Built for indie devs who want real feedback without hiring a QA team.

launches.name: SatelliteForge
launches.tagline: Automated Python SEO engine powered by Mistral AI.
launches.description: Stop paying monthly for low-quality AI content. SatelliteForge is a Python engine that builds semantically dense, structured HTML pages using Mistral AI. Features include automated keyword research, H1/H2/H3/FAQ generation, IndexNow pinging, and Schema.org markup. Zero subscriptions. One-time payment. Run it on your server and forge high-authority niche sites. Includes bilingual EN/FR doc.

launches.name: Sermon Mind
launches.tagline: Searchable sermon libraries for churches.
launches.description: Sermon Mind helps churches turn weekly preaching into a searchable library. Upload a sermon, get an AI-assisted transcript, summary, Scripture references, and tags, then review and publish it privately or publicly. We built it for pastors and church teams that want past teaching to be easier to find, revisit, and share.

launches.name: RizzFox
launches.tagline: Always know what to say
launches.description: Ever received a message and had absolutely no idea what to reply? Or typed something and thought — this sounds so boring? I built RizzFox to solve exactly that. Paste any message you received → tap a cute fox emotion → get the perfect AI generated reply in that style instantly. Or paste YOUR own message → RizzFox rewrites it in 6 different styles so you always sound your best. 🦊 Smooth 😂 Funny 😎 Savage 🥺 Cute 🔥 Flirty 🤝 Honest

launches.name: Key Talk
launches.tagline: Speak. Appear anywhere on your Mac.
launches.description: Most tools treat voice as a feature — we built it as an interface. Instead of just dictation, our product turns voice into actions: write, create notes, manage tasks, or trigger shortcuts in any app. It works instantly, fully offline, with zero setup or integrations. No cloud, no latency, no subscriptions. Just press a key, speak, and it happens.

launches.name: Decision Logger: Track Decisions
launches.tagline: Know your patterns. Decide better.
launches.description: Registre, analise e evolua cada decisão que você toma. Transforme intuição em estratégia com dados A smart journal for your decisions. Decision Logger helps you record important choices, analyze recurring patterns, and gain insights into how you think. Transform reflection into data, and data into better decisions.reais.

launches.name: Managers' Lab
launches.tagline: Built for better decisions. Not more software.
launches.description: Most business owners know something is wrong before the numbers confirm it. Managers' Lab lets you test pricing, costs, and cash timing under real constraints — before you commit to anything. No integrations, no accountant needed. Just your numbers and immediate results.

launches.name: Jurryi
launches.tagline: The AI workspace that learns your team's knowledge
launches.description: Jurryi unifies chat, search, and your team's entire knowledge into a single intelligent platform. Build custom agents, connect 50+ tools (Notion, Slack, Drive), deploy on managed cloud or your own infrastructure. Multi-tenant — every company gets an isolated workspace.

launches.name: ConceptScore
launches.tagline: The decision intelligence platform for strategic teams
launches.description: ConceptScore helps directors, product owners, and consultants turn raw ideas into structured, scored, and presentable decisions without friction. Build your concept with a mind map and Business Model Canvas, run AI-powered analysis, apply weighted scoring, and publish to a decision committee in minutes. Stop justifying gut feelings. Start defending decisions your board will trust.

launches.name: Cenra
launches.tagline: AI agent for Customer Support
launches.description: Cenra is an AI-powered customer support platform designed to help businesses automate and manage customer interactions through intelligent, context-aware conversational agents. The platform enables companies to deliver instant and accurate support without building complex AI infrastructure from scratch. It combines a customizable chat widget, knowledge-based response system, and structured conversation management to create a seamless support experience.

launches.name: Cohortly
launches.tagline: AI-powered application review & scoring for programs
launches.description: Cohortly is an AI-powered application review platform that helps accelerators, grant programs, fellowships, and universities evaluate and score applications faster, more fairly, and at scale using custom rubrics.

launches.name: Pica
launches.tagline: Fully native app for managing your fonts on MacOS
launches.description: Organize into collections, test color themes and logos, watch folders, manage what's installed, and much more.

launches.name: Free chart generator by Embedful
launches.tagline: Turn CSV & Excel files into charts in seconds
launches.description: Turn CSV or Excel files into clean, presentation ready charts in seconds. Upload your data, customize your visuals, and export to PNG, SVG, or PDF for reports and documents. No coding, no setup, completely free.

launches.name: OpenStartup
launches.tagline: Instant profit & pricing calculator for small businesses
launches.description: OpenStartup is a free tool that helps small businesses calculate profit and set the right selling price. Not complicated accounting software. Not a full business dashboard with charts nobody understands. Just a simple, fast, free tool where you enter your ingredients, costs, and quantity — and it instantly tells you your cost per unit, what price to sell at, and exactly how much profit you'll make.

launches.name: Veritads
launches.tagline: Let real people advertise and grow your brand.
launches.description: Veritads connects brands with people who create and post short-form content on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and X from their own accounts. Set your budget, we handle the rest. Get millions of organic views for your product and only pay for verified views. Videos stay up forever. Views keep coming in long after your budget runs out.

launches.name: Life Navigator
launches.tagline: Become The Best Version Of Yourself
launches.description: Become The Best Version Of Yourself. Do you want to plan and organize every aspect of your life in one place? Juggling between multiple apps and remembering deadlines in your head won't work long term. Whether you’re dreaming of having more clarity in your life, tracking and optimizing your schedule, or journaling your thoughts to understand yourself better. This system is made for you. Are you ready to regain control over your life and achieve the clarity you desire?

launches.name: Sharply.me
launches.tagline: The world's sharpest freelance directory.
launches.description: The World's Sharpest Freelance Directory. Your professional proof, all in one link.

launches.name: grepfeed
launches.tagline: Spot viral trends 48h before everyone else.
launches.description: Stop scrolling. Start predicting. Grepfeed uses AI to scan TikTok, Reddit & X and spots viral trends 48h before they blow up. What you get: → Early trend before the mainstream catches on → Ready-to-film content ideas → Hooks & scripts you can use immediately No more "I should've made that video." Be first for once. Built by a creator who was tired of being late. 🎬

launches.name: Save Page as PDF
launches.tagline: Save Page as PDF Chrome extension — HTML to PDF in one click
launches.description: Convert any website to PDF instantly with clean formatting — perfect for articles, invoices, receipts, or full pages. Print, share, or read offline without clutter. Fast, reliable, and simple webpage to PDF converter right in your browser.

launches.name: ShyLink.io
launches.tagline: Secure URL shortener with self-destructing secrets.
launches.description: ShyLink is a privacy-first URL shortener built for teams who value security. Beyond basic links, it features E2EE self-destructing secrets, granular click limits, and branded splash screens. Protect your team from credential leaks and manage every link via a sleek dashboard or our native Chrome extension. No bloated AI, no paywalls for analytics—just robust, secure link management with integrated Google Web Risk auditing. Free for now as we are launching this.

launches.name: LEAP
launches.tagline: All-in-one ERP + CRM built for modern agencies.
launches.description: CRMs stop at the deal. PM tools ignore money. Accounting shows up last. LEAP is the first platform where lead, project, staffing, timesheets, costs, and invoices live as the same records. Watch live project P&L update as worklogs and costs post. The Business Plan module shows company-wide finances at a glance. Time tracking is built in, and every module reads the same data. One source of truth — from first lead to final invoice.

launches.name: Changelogr: Free Changelog Widget
launches.tagline: Add a changelog widget to your app in 60 seconds — free
launches.description: Hey PH! 👋 I built Changelogr because every SaaS founder I talked to manages their changelog in a Notion doc nobody reads. Changelogr is a free, zero-backend changelog widget generator. You fill in your updates, pick a template (popup, banner, or inline), and copy one HTML snippet. Drop it into your app — done. No server, no database, no npm install, no signup. That's the whole growth model. No ads, no paid plans. Would love your honest feedback — what template would you use? What's missing?

launches.name: Calcverse.tools
launches.tagline: 195+ free online tools. No signup, no limits, no nonsense.
launches.description: The site supports 15 languages, has a blog with 145+ deep-dive articles targeting high-search-volume terms, and everything is completely free no tools costs a penny— no account, no paywall, no nonsense. Why it's different: Most tools sites have 20–30 tools and charge for the good ones. RapidTables has the traffic but the UI is stuck in 2008. Calculator.net is fast but limited. Calcverse is trying to be the one that's modern, comprehensive, fast, and genuinely free for all.

launches.name: StructKit
launches.tagline: Fast, private JSON tools for developers
launches.description: StructKit is a fast, no-signup JSON toolkit for developers, SEOs, analysts, and technical operators. It helps users format, validate, and inspect JSON directly in the browser without uploading data or dealing with bloated dashboards. The goal is simple: practical data tools that load fast, work instantly, and stay focused on the job. Current tools include a JSON Formatter and JSON Validator, with more focused JSON utilities coming next.

launches.name: UnderByte
launches.tagline: Compress images and PDFs to exact size limits
launches.description: UnderByte compresses images and PDFs to the exact upload limit you need, like 20 KB, 200 KB, 500 KB, or 1 MB. Everything runs in your browser, so files stay on your device after the app loads. It handles JPG, PNG, WebP, and PDF, supports batch mode, and is built for real-world government, visa, job, and form-upload size limits.

launches.name: OwlInsight
launches.tagline: Google Analytics the simple way.
launches.description: OwlInsight is a Google Analytics alternative interface for GA4. Use your existing Google Analytics setup and code, then review traffic, pages, devices, and multi-property performance without the messy GA site.

launches.name: ilo
launches.tagline: Supercharge your Google Tasks with ilo
launches.description: Supercharge your Google Tasks™ with ilo. ilo helps you manage Google Tasks™ and Google Calendar™ across multiple Google accounts in one date-first dashboard. Key features: - Multiple Google accounts in one view - Grouped task lists and project structure - Yesterday, today, and tomorrow planning - Mini calendar for workload checks - 2-way Sync with Google Tasks™ and Google Calendar™ Don't leave Google. Supercharge it with ilo.

launches.name: Video to Image Sequence
launches.tagline: Extract video frames free no upload, no limits, 100% private
launches.description: Most video frame extractors upload your file to a server — we don't. Everything runs 100% in your browser. ✅ No file size limit ✅ No server upload — 100% private ✅ JPG or PNG output ✅ Custom FPS (1, 5, 10, 24, 30) ✅ Batch process multiple videos ✅ ZIP download all frames ✅ Works on any device — free forever Perfect for animators, game devs, VFX artists, and ML engineers.

launches.name: Unskroll
launches.tagline: Stop Scrolling. Start Doing.
launches.description: Unskroll is a habit-building app. Instead of blocking your feeds, it gives you one short task a day to do instead of scrolling. - 4 tracks: meditation, running, workouts, reading - One task per day, 5-30 min - Streaks, freeze days, a mascot called Scrolly Android (free), iOS soon

launches.name: UtiliBox
launches.tagline: 100+ free tools, calculators, PDF utilities & health tools.
launches.description: Utilibox is a free browser-based hub with 60+ tools: financial calculators (salary, loans, investments, taxes), PDF tools (compress, merge, split — all in-browser, no server upload), health calculators (BMI, ovulation, pregnancy tracking) and general utilities. Everything runs locally — your data never leaves your device.

launches.name: Forgettie
launches.tagline: Control subscriptions. Plan bills. Save smarter.
launches.description: Most people underestimate recurring costs. A $9.99 subscription becomes $120 a year, and eight of them quietly become almost $1,000. Forgettie helps by making hidden costs visible: what renews next, what each bill really costs per year, which payments may be worth cancelling, and which yearly bills you should prepare for. It works offline, with no bank login and no account required.

launches.name: CasaKeeper
launches.tagline: Home Manager
launches.description: CasaKeeper helps homeowners stay on top of maintenance, store important home documents/receipts, and keep contractor contacts organized—per property. Set reminders for recurring tasks, archive completed items, and find what you need fast with search. Upgrade to Premium for cloud sync across devices, unlimited items, and easy export/import.

launches.name: Build Healthy Habits - STICK
launches.tagline: Build habits with friends. Put money on the line.
launches.description: This idea came about after a friend and I bet each other $20 for everyday we didn't go to the gym. After 6 months, I lost over 60 lbs, made some mone from him and now I want to make this available to others to help them STICK to what matters to them. STICK is solo and/or with a group. Put your money where your mouth is, bring your own routine, and commit to sticking to it.

launches.name: Odozi
launches.tagline: Open-source iOS journal that auto-tracks your patterns
launches.description: Odozi is a private mood journal for iOS. Track gratitude, sleep, screen time, and daily patterns in about two minutes a day. Local-first, no ads, no tracking.

launches.name: DAW Converter
launches.tagline: Convert FLP, ALS & MIDI files online — fast & simple
launches.description: Free online tools for FL Studio (.flp), Ableton Live (.als), Reaper (.rpp), LMMS (.mmpz), and MIDI files. Analyze metadata, detect plugins, downgrade versions, and export MIDI — no install required.

launches.name: Outsource Rizz
launches.tagline: Fast design + dev as a subscription for startups
launches.description: Outsourcerizz is a design & dev subscription service built specifically for startups. One flat monthly price. Unlimited requests. Fast, predictable delivery with none of the overhead of a traditional agency. How it works: Intro call + subscribe → submit your design/ dev requests → get polished work delivered fast. Pause or cancel anytime.

launches.name: StackMind
launches.tagline: StackMind - A second brain specifically for developers.
launches.description: I built StackMind — a second brain specifically for developers. Why I built it: I was using Notion for notes, GitHub Gists for snippets, and Linear for bugs. Switching between 3 tools constantly was killing my flow. So I built one place that does all of it. Still in active development — bugs are expected and feedback is gold right now. Would love brutal honest feedback from fellow devs. What's missing? What's broken? What would make you actually use this daily?

launches.name: Flux Theme
launches.tagline: Multipage Astro templates for modern websites
launches.description: Flux Theme gives teams a scalable foundation from the start. Structured folder architecture, pre-configured integrations, and repeatable patterns that hold up as your product, team, and codebase expand.consistent visual system.

launches.name: Stackrate
launches.tagline: Dev-to-dev peer review. Real feedback from devs who ship.
launches.description: Stackrate is a peer review platform for indie devs tired of "looks cool!" feedback. Submit your app, define what to review (UX, onboarding, value prop, performance), and get structured honest feedback from GitHub-verified developers who ship. The credit system: review one app, earn a review for yours. Bad reviews lose credits — quality is enforced, not hoped for. No popularity contests. Just honest peer critique from people who build.

launches.name: SureGrid
launches.tagline: From risk to ready — faster than your next audit.
launches.description: AI based automated compliance, audits, and security with SureGrid. Manage ISO, SOC 2, GDPR, and more in one platform with real-time risk monitoring.

launches.name: SqueezeKit
launches.tagline: SaaS boilerplate
launches.description: Hey Hunters 👋 Built SqueezeKit because every Next.js SaaS boilerplate I tried assumed Stripe Connect. None were built around Lemon Squeezy Connect where your users connect their own LS account and become Merchant of Record on their own storefronts. the stack: ⚛️ Next.js 16 + React 19 🗄️ Supabase (RLS everywhere) 💳 Lemon Squeezy Connect 📝 TypeScript strict 🎨 Tailwind v4 + shadcn 📘 Fumadocs extracted from a working SaaS. not tutorial code.

launches.name: Exofe
launches.tagline: Free AI Background Remover — Exofe
launches.description: Remove image backgrounds instantly with AI. Upload any photo, get a transparent PNG in seconds. 100% free, works in your browser, no sign-up required.

launches.name: Contract Clear-Smart Contract Explainer
launches.tagline: Understand any smart contract in seconds
launches.description: Understand any Ethereum smart contract in seconds. Get plain English explanations, risk scores, and permission breakdowns.
